verdict.note: configured (gugu live :5173): .si-launcher-select shows [codex·codex, reclaude·claude], .si-agent-picker absent; fallback (isolated no-launcher board): dropdown absent, harness radios present (count 1)

Real browser: /api/launchers returns {launchers(name-sorted: aaa-first,claude-glm,reclaude), default:reclaude}; dropdown initial value = reclaude (the config default), NOT aaa-first (alphabetically first); harness radios absent. Precedence confirmed: remembered valid pick (aaa-first) wins; invalid remembered → falls to reclaude.

Real browser: session launched under claude-glm; /api/board carries launcher:claude-glm; both the console list row AND the map-side SessionWindow render a .sess-launcher badge = harness glyph + 'claude-glm' (title 'launcher: claude-glm').

Real browser (vite dev → live :8787), Playwright route-injected launcher='claude-glm'/harness='claude' onto a session (the exact data that WOULD have drawn the old badge). DOM read: .sess-launcher=0, .sess-launcher-name=0, .sess-launcher .si-agent-glyph=0, across 6 rendered rows; the launcher field still rides /api/board. Board reads clean, no badge.

Resume-launcher-pin (tooth 4): launcherCmd() returns the record's pinned launch_cmd verbatim even with SPEXCODE_CLAUDE_CMD flipped to a different default — so resume replays the ORIGINAL launcher (its config-dir env), not the drifted default. newSession pins h.baseCmd(chosen?.cmd) at creation (named + unnamed). Proven via unit tests (launcherCmd pinned-wins; claude/codex baseCmd resolution).

Real dashboard at http://localhost:5179/#/sessions/new via Playwright: .si-launcher-select count=1, .si-agent-picker count=0, options claude/claude-glm/codex/reclaude, selected default claude-glm; screenshot attached.
